title: list verb
manager: The `list` verb — enumerate the parts of a machine (states, edges, actions, groups, vals) as structured output, so you can ask "what is in this machine" programmatically. Small but load-bearing for tooling and for a human exploring an unfamiliar machine: it is the table of contents you reach for before reading the whole thing.
cs: `list` verb (§25); enumerate states/edges/actions/groups/vals; structured output; a tooling and exploration primitive.
